title: aspidium subcrenulatum
intro: Aspidium subcrenulatum, also known as the subcrenulate fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The subcrenulate fern is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Aspidium subcrenulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried for use in soups and other culinary dishes, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
intro_study: According to "Pharmacognosy magazine", Aspidium subcrenulatum, a constituent of Sirupeelai Samoola Kudineer (SK), has been found to provide structural and functional protection to the kidneys against stone formation.
